# All Skating Rinks

## Current status

All Skating Rinks is a legacy skating-location directory undergoing source and editorial review.

## Verified repository facts

- The dataset contains 1,263 records with a name, state label, latitude, and longitude.
- 576 records contain a city field; 687 do not.
- Every record has only the generic amenity value `Skating`.
- The repository does not document the original data source or collection date.
- The dataset does not contain current hours, prices, rink type, rentals, lessons, parties, accessibility, contact details, or operating status.

## Indexing and usage

- The homepage, About page, and Contact page may be indexed.
- State and record pages are excluded from search indexing while they lack traceable sources and current venue facts.
- A legacy record is a discovery lead, not live verification that a venue exists, is open, or admits the public.
- Visitors should confirm all visit details with a current official venue, operator, municipal, or other primary source.

## Corrections

Corrections may be sent to https://allskatingrinks.com/contact. Include the record URL and a current source when possible. Submissions are reviewed before publication.

## Monetization

Google AdSense, Google Analytics, and Microsoft Clarity are not currently enabled. No affiliate relationship or tracked affiliate link is claimed. Bulk legacy pages are not monetization-ready.
